---
title: "Project Poster"
format: html
---

Access this [link](https://smu-my.sharepoint.com/:i:/g/personal/hs_pham_2024_mitb_smu_edu_sg/IQC6DeH_GWFaTIIIgpoq-YrYASWu4ngQVrdZd6TOtGahbQY?e=yFvRRj the updated version) to download our poster with original quality.

![](images/Group4_ProjectPoster.jpg)
